title: Amazon’s AI-powered Alexa+ gets new personality options
description: Users will be able to choose from Alexa styles like Brief, Chill, or Sweet, Amazon says.
content: Users will be able to choose from Alexa styles like Brief, Chill, or Sweet, Amazon says.
